channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UNIZIK Awards Emeka Ezekwe for Contributions to Education and AI Development
item.description: The Nnamdi Azikiwe University (UNIZIK), Awka, don confer Digital Academic Promoter Award on High Chief (Dr.) Emeka Ezekwe, the MD and CEO of Arrowconn Group, to recognise him for him philanthropic ges...

item.title: Hidden Thunderstorms Are the Main Source of Saharan Dust
item.description: Saharan dust that reaches Europe and the UK originates largely from previously overlooked thunderstorms high above the desert rather than the familiar wind systems traditionally thought to transport i...

item.title: Incident in Andhra Pradesh School Where Class 10 Student Assaulted Teacher
item.description: In Andhra Pradesh, an alarming incident occurred in a school where a Class 10 student physically assaulted a teacher. The event, captured on video, quickly circulated on social media, drawing widespre...

item.title: Polisi Tanzania prepare seriously for CRDB Cup match against Yanga at KMC Stadium
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Polisi Tanzania football team have ramped up their preparations ahead of the CRDB Cup clash against defending champions Young Africans (Yanga) scheduled at KMC Stadium this weekend. Ac...

item.title: Indian Congress criticises government over US approval for Russian oil imports
item.description: The Indian National Congress has criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi's BJP government after the United States temporarily allowed the sale of Russian oil stranded at sea to India. Congress claims ...

item.title: South Bow applies lessons from Keystone XL to plan new Canada-U.S. pipeline project
item.description: South Bow Energy, led by its CEO, is moving forward with plans for a new cross-border pipeline while drawing lessons from the troubled Keystone XL project. The company is focused on carefully navigati...

item.title: Assessment of US and Gulf Air Defence Preparedness Against Iran’s Missile and Drone Threats
item.description: The United States and its allies in the Middle East, including Israel and the Gulf states, face a serious challenge from Iran’s ongoing drone and missile attacks. Despite the death of Iran’s supreme l...

item.title: Defence phase underway in Senzo Meyiwa murder trial at North Gauteng High Court
item.description: The Senzo Meyiwa murder trial is currently in the defence phase at the North Gauteng High Court in Pretoria. The state has concluded three years of presenting evidence, and the focus has now shifted t...

item.title: US-Israel Iran War Enters Attritional Phase on Day 7 with Rising Costs and Asymmetric Tactics
item.description: Seven days into the ongoing war between the US-Israeli coalition and Iran, the conflict has shifted from intense initial strikes to a prolonged battle of endurance. The coalition maintains air and nav...

item.title: Department of Migrant Workers urges additional funding amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) recently informed Philippine senators that additional funding may be necessary to support overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) if the ongoing crisis in the Middle E...

item.title: Multiple Nigerian Soldiers Killed and Injured in Boko Haram Ambush at Sambisa Forest
item.description: Today for Sambisa Forest, we don hear say some Boko Haram insurgents don launch serious attack wey don cost plenty Nigerian soldiers their lives and injure others. The attack happen for Sambisa, Borno...

item.title: Study shows 47% drop in mole counts among Australian children from 1992 to 2016, linked to better sun protection
item.description: A long-term study in Australia has revealed a significant decline in the number of moles on children's skin over the past few decades, which bodes well for reducing melanoma risk in future generations...

item.title: Naivasha Mother Arrested for Assaulting Daughter Captured on CCTV
item.description: In Naivasha, a mother was arrested after CCTV footage captured her physically assaulting her young daughter at around 9pm on Thursday, February 26. The video, which went viral online, showed the mothe...

item.title: Tanzania Promotes Electric Vehicles to Cut Transport Costs
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzania dey push for electric vehicle (EV) usage as research show say operating EVs fit cost about 85 percent less per kilometer than petrol or diesel vehicles. According to Engineer ...

item.title: Bob Carr Reflects on Love, Loss and Life After Helena’s Passing
item.description: Bob Carr, former NSW premier and Australian foreign minister, opens up about the profound grief he experienced after the sudden death of his wife, Helena, from an aneurism in October 2023. Their five-...

item.title: UPSC CSE 2025 Results Declared; Gulf Energy Exports at Risk Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially declared the final results for the Civil Services Examination 2025, recommending 958 candidates for appointments in IAS, IFS, IPS, and other c...

item.title: Man receives whole life prison sentence for murdering woman and her three children in Bradford house fire
item.description: Sharaz Ali, aged 40, has been sentenced to a whole life order at Doncaster Crown Court, meaning he will never be released from prison. He was convicted in December 2025 of murdering Bryonie Gawith, 29...

item.title: Former UK diplomat claims Foreign Office ignored warnings of impending US-Israeli strikes on Iran
item.description: A former British diplomat, Ameer Kotecha, who recently resigned from the Foreign Office, has claimed that the UK's ambassador in Israel, Simon Walters, warned London weeks in advance that an attack on...

item.title: Trump Replaces Interior Secretary Kristi Noem Amid Controversy Over Immigration Policy and Misconduct
item.description: On March 6, 2026, former South Dakota Governor and U.S. Secretary of the Interior Kristi Noem was dismissed by President Trump due to widespread criticism over her role in harsh immigration enforcemen...

item.title: Former Free Britney Advocate Questions End of Spears' Conservatorship Following DUI Arrest
item.description: A former advocate of the #FreeBritney movement has expressed regret over the campaign to end Britney Spears' conservatorship, following the singer's recent arrest for driving under the influence (DUI)...
